title: Runtime UX hardening from external M58 comparison
scope: CLI/runtime only; documentation style audit intentionally excluded
changes_adopted_from_m58: cleaner state snapshot envelope with session_chain and state keys
protections_retained_from_m59_3: embedded runtime CLI allowlist blocks authoring commands
compiled IR remains runtime source of truth
per-node evidence report path and SHA-256 digest
verify-session canary scan and chain verification
known_limits: No cryptographic protection against a malicious actor with full source/filesystem access
